query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A reddish-brown form resembling a rough human head and neck is centered against a solid black background. The surface shows irregular topography with hollowed areas suggesting eye sockets, a nasal cavity, and an open mouth, alongside mottled patches of lighter and darker pigment. The figure appears to emerge from and recede into the surrounding darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A decayed and degraded humanoid head looms from an oppressively dark void, its surface rendered in sickly reddish-brown tones that suggest organic rot and contamination. The facial features have dissolved into smeared, ambiguous texture with almost no fine detail, creating an abstract and surreal impression of a face in distress. Extreme underexposure plunges most of the frame into suffocating blackness, while the muted, faded palette and dreamlike distortion evoke dread, decay, and visceral unease.
